title: Navigating the overlap between IBC and arbitration vis-à-vis moratorium: A judicial overview of the evolving framework
description: The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code (“IBC”) was enacted in order to consolidate and amend the laws relating to reorganization and insolvency resolution of corporate persons, partnership firms and individuals within a specific time frame in order to ensure maximum utilization of the value of assets, for the purpose of promoting entrepreneurship, availability of credit and above all, ensuring the interest of all the stakeholders.  Moratorium under the IBC: A roadblock or regulator for arbitrat
